subcodes.first_line: This is a day whose virtues have been extolled aforetime in the divine Books. These are days of supreme rejoicing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز روزیست که از قبل فضایلش را ذکر نموده اند در کتب الهی این ایام جشن عظیم
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the power of words; of speech
